signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, up from January's 5-month low of 2.0% but below market forecasts of 2.4%[1][3]. This latest Statistics Korea figure, reported recently, aligns with the Bank of Korea's revised 2026 outlook of 2.2% and remains near its 2% target amid
